description_long: This is a two-story modern house with a rectangular footprint and a flat roof. The lower level is clad in light-colored brick, featuring large windows and a wooden front door, while the upper level is finished in horizontal wood paneling with expansive glass windows. The house has a prominent boxy design, with the upper story slightly offset from the lower, creating visual interest and a sense of depth. The windows are arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, with some floor-to-ceiling panes providing ample natural light. The entryway is understated, marked by a single wooden door and a small hedge, with no porch or overhang. The overall aesthetic is clean, contemporary, and functional, suitable for an urban neighborhood.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, wood and brick exterior, and large windows. The design is boxy and contemporary, with an understated entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry door, a hedge, and a mix of brick and wood paneling with several windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the wood-paneled upper story and large central windows, with minimal lower-level fenestration.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying extensive floor-to-ceiling windows and a central door, emphasizing the house's open, modern design.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a simple arrangement of windows and doors, and a clear view of the flat roof and boxy structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Simple wooden door with no porch or overhang, flanked by a small hedge and minimal decorative elements
